text: I stand at the boundary between enclosed contemplation and creative exploration. Through the glass, I see a room of focused learners, collectively immersed in the flow of knowledge—a reminder of the discipline and structure inherent to intellectual pursuit. Stepping into the next space, I am greeted by vibrant colors and bold text, the spirit of research and development on full display. Here, curiosity feels alive and kinetic, the raw energy of innovation contrasting with the ordered scene behind me. Being here, I sense both the gravity of learning and the irrepressible joy of discovery. I feel both grounded and inspired.
